meaning: n.假期,休假,(房屋等的)腾出v.<美>度假,休假
examples: We're going to the beach for vacation.
They're on vacation in Hawaii right now.
The job includes two weeks' paid vacation.
But some farms tell guests just to relax -- it is a vacation after all.
Most people don't return from a vacation with an album's worth of new songs under their belts.
